历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category (formerly Science) was approximately 10657 → 10733 → 13516 → 25420 → 10380. In 2023–2024, due to the inclusion of records from the first batch of undergraduate B segment, the ranking significantly shifted backward, returning to 10380 in 2025, with large fluctuations in recent two years. The 2025 baseline is approximately 10380. The provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 65 in 2021, 66 in 2022, 65 in 2023, 66 in 2024, and 70 in 2025, showing a slight increasing trend. The 2026 plan is 73, an expansion of about 4.3% compared to 2025, slightly easing competition but to a limited extent.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. In the 2026 Soft Science main ranking, it is approximately 56th, with stable rankings in the 48–61 range in recent years, indicating a mid-to-upper level comprehensive strength nationwide. Its reputation has been stable recently, with no significant negative public opinion or record of enrollment gaps. Its Douyin popularity has not entered the national top 100, with moderate attention, having a neutral impact on application psychology. Geology and Geological Resources and Geological Engineering are A+ disciplines, while Geophysics, Environmental Science and Engineering, etc., are A- or above, highly correlated with the university's enrollment majors (Geology, Geophysics, Environmental Science and Engineering, etc.), providing stable attraction for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text:
Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering, etc., continue to be highly recommended. Among the Physics Category enrollment majors at this university, Computer Science, Electronic Information, Automation, etc., are highly popular, potentially increasing competition for related majors. The total number of examinees in the province in 2026 is approximately 154,000, an increase of about 32.3% compared to 2025 (approximately 116,000), with Physics Category examinees at about 111,000, a significant increase, intensifying competition. Data for 2026 is missing. The university is located in Wuhan, Hubei, in the central region, with no obvious regional preference advantage for Inner Mongolia examinees. The university's enrollment proportion in Inner Mongolia is about 1.3%–1.5%, which is a typical cross-province enrollment scale.
8. [Prediction Conclusion] Based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 10380, the slight expansion of the 2026 plan (+4.3%), the significant increase in provincial Physics Category examinees (+32.4%), and the stable university reputation, etc.: The expansion has a downward effect on ranking (ranking number increases), but the competitive pressure from the surge in examinee numbers is more significant, so the ranking is expected to shift slightly backward. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 10700, with a range of 10200–11200.

If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (within 10200), focus on aiming for popular Tier 1 majors such as Computer Science and Electronic Information. If the ranking is near the upper limit of the range (around 11200), it is recommended to prioritize Tier 3 majors such as Geology and Environmental Science and Engineering, which are advantageous disciplines.
